subcodes.first_line: O my God! How I yearn for Thy resplendent beauty, Thy radiant face, the sweetness of reunion with Thee, and my heart thirsts for the wellspring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: واشوقی یا الهی الی باهی جمالک و ضاحی وجهک و شهی وصالک و ظماء قلبی لمعین
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
